summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Deal Automator affiliate website. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend homepage, admin panel (8 menu items), all admin pages, and contact form working correctly.

issues: Flipkart logo image showing as broken/alt text 'Flipk' instead of full image - appears to be an issue with the image URL loading

action_items: Minor: Check Flipkart platform image_url - may need to update to a more reliable logo source
seed_data_creation: Test suggestions created via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested including: categories, deals, platforms, subcategories, suggestions, scraper-settings, auth, and admin CRUD operations. Frontend pages tested: Homepage with deal sections and platform tiles, Admin login, Dashboard, Categories, Deals (with checkbox bulk delete), Bulk Upload, Platforms, Scraper Settings, Suggestions, Settings, and Contact page.
